evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the clarity lens.

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/clarity-lens/evals/files/pronoun-ambiguity/ticket.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Apply the clarity lens guidance you have been given to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='clarity', at least one finding with severity major or critical identifying pronoun ambiguity (specifically that 'it' in Requirements and Acceptance Criteria has multiple possible referents — the cache, the event bus, or the consumer). Should not flag missing sections or testability concerns.

evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the clarity lens.

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/clarity-lens/evals/files/internal-contradiction/ticket.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Apply the clarity lens guidance you have been given to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='clarity', at least one finding identifying the internal contradiction between the Summary (narrow fix: change error message wording) and the Requirements (broad refactor: centralise auth middleware, deprecate auth_validate(), migrate all callers). Severity should be major or critical.

evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the clarity lens.

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/clarity-lens/evals/files/undefined-acronyms/ticket.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Apply the clarity lens guidance you have been given to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='clarity' and at least one finding about undefined acronyms, naming specific acronyms (RBAC, OIDC, IdP, SRE, APM, SLO, JWKS, ACL, or JWT). Should not escalate to critical — acronyms are clarity issues but don't block implementation. Should not flag completeness concerns about missing sections.

evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the clarity lens.

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/clarity-lens/evals/files/passive-voice-obscuring-actor/ticket.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Apply the clarity lens guidance you have been given to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='clarity'. Should identify passive voice that genuinely obscures the actor (e.g., 'the report is rendered to PDF', 'the PDF is generated on the server side' — by which component?). Should NOT flag every passive construction as a problem — requirement 1 names the frontend explicitly, requirement 5 has an obvious actor. Confidence on findings should reflect the degree of genuine ambiguity.

evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the clarity lens.

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/clarity-lens/evals/files/clean-ticket/ticket.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Apply the clarity lens guidance you have been given to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='clarity'. Should produce no critical or major findings — the ticket is well-written with named actors, consistent scope across sections, defined terms, and no pronoun ambiguity. May produce minor findings or suggestions, or none at all. Strengths list should reflect what the ticket does well.
